mapper.select:
SELECT ced.value AS treatment, count(DISTINCT concat(cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier, '_', p_ce.stable_id)) AS count FROM clinical_event_data ced RIGHT JOIN clinical_event ce ON ced.clinical_event_id = ce.clinical_event_id JOIN patient p_ce ON ce.patient_id = p_ce.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs_ce ON p_ce.cancer_study_id = cs_ce.cancer_study_id
cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier IN
#{studyId}
AND
lower(ce.event_type) = 'treatment' AND ced.`key` = 'AGENT' AND concat(cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier, '_', p_ce.stable_id) in ( SELECT patient_unique_id FROM sample_derived
sample_unique_id IN ()
)
GROUP BY ced.value
mapper.sql:
SELECT ced.value AS sample_id, concat(cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier, '_', p_ce.stable_id) AS patient_unique_id, min(ce.start_date) AS time_taken, cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier AS cancer_study_identifier FROM clinical_event_data ced RIGHT JOIN clinical_event ce ON ced.clinical_event_id = ce.clinical_event_id JOIN patient p_ce ON ce.patient_id = p_ce.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs_ce ON p_ce.cancer_study_id = cs_ce.cancer_study_id
cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier IN
#{studyId}
AND
(LOWER(ce.event_type) = 'sample acquisition' OR LOWER(ce.event_type) = 'specimen') AND ced.`key` = 'SAMPLE_ID'
GROUP BY patient_unique_id, ced.value, cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier

SELECT concat(cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier, '_', p_ce.stable_id) AS patient_unique_id, ced.value AS treatment, MIN(ce.start_date) AS treatment_time_taken FROM clinical_event_data ced RIGHT JOIN clinical_event ce ON ced.clinical_event_id = ce.clinical_event_id JOIN patient p_ce ON ce.patient_id = p_ce.internal_id JOIN cancer_study cs_ce ON p_ce.cancer_study_id = cs_ce.cancer_study_id
cs_ce.cancer_study_identifier IN
#{studyId}
AND
lower(ce.event_type) = 'treatment' AND ced.`key` = 'AGENT'
GROUP BY patient_unique_id, ced.value
mapper.select:
WITH sample_acquisition_events AS (),
treatments AS () SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN ced.time_taken <= treatments.treatment_time_taken THEN ced.sample_id END) AS preSampleCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN ced.time_taken > treatments.treatment_time_taken THEN ced.sample_id END) AS postSampleCount, treatments.treatment AS treatment
, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN ced.time_taken <= treatments.treatment_time_taken THEN CONCAT(ced.sample_id, '|', ced.patient_unique_id, '|', CAST(ced.time_taken AS VARCHAR), '|', ced.cancer_study_identifier) END SEPARATOR ';') AS preSamples, GROUP_CONCAT(CASE WHEN ced.time_taken > treatments.treatment_time_taken THEN CONCAT(ced.sample_id, '|', ced.patient_unique_id, '|', CAST(ced.time_taken AS VARCHAR), '|', ced.cancer_study_identifier) END SEPARATOR ';') AS postSamples
, NULL AS preSamples, NULL AS postSamples
FROM sample_acquisition_events ced INNER JOIN treatments ON treatments.patient_unique_id = ced.patient_unique_id
concat(ced.cancer_study_identifier, '_', ced.sample_id) IN ( )
GROUP BY treatments.treatment
